chunks.text: Student Award: Arthur M. Hopkin Award | EECS at UC Berkeley Arthur M. Hopkin Award The Hopkin award honors an outstanding Electrical Engineering undergraduate who demonstrates seriousness of purpose and high academic achievement. This award honors Professor Arthur M. ("Mac") Hopkin, an expert in the field of nonlinear control, who joined the EECS faculty in 1954 and served on our department's faculty for 46 years. The award is to be used by the student for furthering their education. Awardees 2024-2025 Sanjay Chintapally, Alexander Di, Alishba Imran, Nikhil Jain, Leon Kornfeld, James Ni, Sasvath Ramachandran, Varun Srivastava, Kenneth Wang 2023-2024 Yash Aggarwal, Cassie Areff, William Fei, Patrick Jin, Vint Lee, Jonathan Lu, Lucy Revina, Tanush Talati, Oliver Yu, Jonathan Yue 2022-2023 Chase Norman, Dhruv Vaish 2021-2022 Simon Guo, Chase Norman, Naomi Sagan, Neeraj Shenoy, Lizhi Yang 2020-2021 Leyla Kabuli, Simon Li, Anand Kumar Siththaranjan, Ashwin Vangipuram, Andy Wu, David Yi 2019-2020 Sampada Deglurkar, Matt Yeh 2018-2019 Shreyas Agarwal, Olivia Hsu, Aviral Pandey, Yunzhi Zhang 2017-2018 Minghan Chao, Kanaad Parvate 2016-2017 Minghan Chao, Nicholas Landolfi, Viraj Mahesh, Titan Yuan 2015-2016 Joseph Hui 2014-2015 Sahar Mesri, Nitish Padmanaban, Sahaana Suri, Paroma Varma 2013-2014 Jingyan Wang 2012-2013 Anuran Makur, Zhengyuan Zhou 2011-2012 Sameet Ramakrishnan 2010-2011 Dorsa Sadigh 2009-2010 Judy Hoffman 2008-2009 Irving Lin, Victor Shia, Curtis Wang 2007-2008 Pamela Lee, Liang Jie Wong 2006-2007 John Torous 2005-2006 Robert D.
